text.content:
Danvers, MA – March 5th, 2025 – MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, is pleased to announce its participation in PROMAT 2025, the largest material handling and logistic trade show in North America, taking place March 17-20 at McCormick Place in Chicago, IL. We look forward to sharing our advanced tire solutions and engaging with industry professionals throughout the event.

As a recognized leader in industrial tire manufacturing, MAXAM Tire will proudly feature our MS600 and MS700 Industrial Forklift Tires – both powered by our innovative EcoPoint3 Technology. Developed to provide exceptional tire life and superior traction, EcoPoint3 has enabled MAXAM to deliver performance that surpasses standard OEM tires while generating notable cost savings and increased productivity for our customers.

Throughout the show attendees are encouraged to visit Booth #E10931 to connect with our team of experts. Our specialists will be on hand to offer insights into how EcoPoint3 Technology continues to raise industry benchmarks. Visitors will gain firsthand knowledge on how MAXAM’s innovative approach to tire design and manufacturing translates into tangible benefits for businesses of all sizes.

“PROMAT 2025 offers a unique opportunity for us to demonstrate the real-world advantages of EcoPoint3-powered tires,” said Jimmy McDonnell, VP of Sales and Marketing for MAXAM Tire. “We are excited to showcase how our customers have achieved remarkable results – from cost efficiencies to elevated performance – and we’re eager to help others realize the same success.

For more information on MAXAM Tire’s participation at PROMAT 2025 or to schedule a meeting at our booth, contact us at marketing@maxamtirena.com.
